description: An ICE poster in portrait format with a dark desaturated palette. The right side shows a black-and-white and blue-tinted photograph of a young Black man wearing eyeglasses and a telephone headset, viewed in profile; faint blue binary digits (0s and 1s) are overlaid across the dark background. The top-left carries the full-color U.S. Department of Homeland Security seal beside the wordmark 'U.S. Immigration and Customs Enforcement' in white serif. Below it, white serif text reads 'Sharing timely & relevant information with law enforcement partners' with 'around the world.' in blue. The lower-left has a large stacked all-caps title in white and blue: 'LAW ENFORCEMENT SUPPORT CENTER' with red triple-slash accents and the URL 'ICE.gov/LESC'.
notable_text: Sharing timely & relevant information with law enforcement partners around the world; LAW ENFORCEMENT SUPPORT CENTER; ICE.gov/LESC
